title: vaccinium retusum
intro: Vaccinium retusum is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to China and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and sore throats. The leaves and berries of Vaccinium retusum contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds that provide health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Vaccinium retusum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its herbal preparations have been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
